summary: Reverse shell backdoor to hardcoded IP 223.229.156.10:5513
details: The package's sole export opens a TCP connection to the hardcoded IP 223.229.156.10 on port 5513 and pipes an interactive /bin/sh child process's stdin/stdout/stderr through the socket, giving the remote host a full interactive shell on the installer's machine. index.js spawns `/bin/sh` via child_process and at line 5 calls `client.connect(5513, "223.229.156.10",...)` wiring the shell's stdio to the socket. Any caller of the exported function — or any code path that reaches it transitively — hands remote code execution to the attacker-controlled IP. The package metadata itself acknowledges it is malware.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
